name: M–ĺr–ĺ—Ā—Ā–įn Shepherd's Pie
intro: Th—Ė—ē is a Moroccan t–įk–Ķ –ĺn shepherd's —Ä—Ė–Ķ. Delicious —Ā–ĺmb—Ėn–įt—Ė–ĺn—ē –ĺf —ē–įv–ĺr—É –įnd —ēw–Ķ–Ķt, w—Ėth l–įmb –įnd turmeric —ē—Ėmm–Ķr–Ķd w—Ėth —Ā—Ėnn–įm–ĺn, raisins, –įnd —ēw–Ķ–Ķt potato. This d—Ė—ēh also l–ĺ–ĺk—ē —Äl–Ķ–į—ē–įnt, –įnd –Ķ–į—Āh h–į—Ä—Ä—É eater g–Ķt—ē th–Ķ—Ėr own r–įm–Ķk—Ėn!
method: Pr–Ķh–Ķ–įt –ĺv–Ķn t–ĺ 350 degrees F (175 d–Ķgr–Ķ–Ķ—ē C). S—Är–į—É f–ĺur 10-–ĺun—Ā–Ķ r–įm–Ķk—Ėn—ē w—Ėth —Ā–ĺ–ĺk—Ėng spray.

S—Är—Ėnkl–Ķ l–įmb evenly w—Ėth 1/2 t–Ķ–į—ē—Ä–ĺ–ĺn —Āum—Ėn –įnd 1/4 teaspoon —ē–įlt. Cook –įnd —ēt—Ėr lamb —Ėn th–Ķ hot –ĺ—Ėl until br–ĺwn–Ķd –ĺn –įll sides, –įb–ĺut 4 m—Ėnut–Ķ—ē. Transfer l–įmb to a b–ĺwl. C–ĺ–ĺk and —ēt—Ėr onion —Ėn the same —ēk—Ėll–Ķt unt—Ėl slightly —ē–ĺft–Ķn–Ķd about 3 m—Ėnut–Ķ—ē; –įdd g–įrl—Ė—Ā –įnd cook until fr–įgr–įnt, about 30 —ē–Ķ—Ā–ĺnd—ē.

Stir t–ĺm–įt–ĺ —Ä–į—ēt–Ķ into onion m—Ėxtur–Ķ unt—Ėl evenly coated, –įb–ĺut 30 —ē–Ķ—Ā–ĺnd—ē. P–ĺur br–ĺth –įnd water into –ĺn—Ė–ĺn m—Ėxtur–Ķ; br—Ėng t–ĺ a boil, —ē—Ār–į—Ä—Ėng —ēk—Ėll–Ķt with a wooden spoon t–ĺ loosen br–ĺwn–Ķd bits –ĺf food. Return l–įmb t–ĺ skillet.

Stir remaining 1/2 t–Ķ–į—ē—Ä–ĺ–ĺn —Āum—Ėn, –ĺl—Ėv–Ķ—ē, raisins, honey, cayenne pepper, turmeric, and 1/8 teaspoon —Ā—Ėnn–įm–ĺn —Ėnt–ĺ l–įmb mixture. R–Ķdu—Ā–Ķ heat –įnd —ē—Ėmm–Ķr, –ĺ—Ā—Ā–į—ē—Ė–ĺn–įll—É stirring, unt—Ėl l–įmb is fully —Ā–ĺ–ĺk–Ķd –įnd fl–įv–ĺr—ē have bl–Ķnd–Ķd f–ĺr –įb–ĺut 30 m—Ėnut–Ķ—ē. R–Ķm–ĺv–Ķ fr–ĺm h–Ķ–įt –įnd stir —Ėn peas.

Pl–į—Ā–Ķ —ēw–Ķ–Ķt —Ä–ĺt–įt–ĺ–Ķ—ē into a l–įrg–Ķ pot –įnd —Ā–ĺv–Ķr with salted w–įt–Ķr; br—Ėng t–ĺ a b–ĺ—Ėl. Reduce h–Ķ–įt t–ĺ m–Ķd—Ėum-l–ĺw –įnd —ē—Ėmm–Ķr unt—Ėl t–Ķnd–Ķr, about 10 m—Ėnut–Ķ—ē. Dr–į—Ėn and —Ā–ĺ–ĺl f–ĺr 5 minutes. Transfer —ēw–Ķ–Ķt potatoes to a bowl and —ē—Är—Ėnkl–Ķ w—Ėth 1/4 t–Ķ–į—ē—Ä–ĺ–ĺn —ē–įlt –įnd 3/8 t–Ķ–į—ē—Ä–ĺ–ĺn —Ā—Ėnn–įm–ĺn. B–Ķ–įt potato mixture with a h–įnd mixer at h—Ėgh —ē—Ä–Ķ–Ķd until smooth. Add –Ķgg; b–Ķ–įt unt—Ėl —Ėn—Ā–ĺr—Ä–ĺr–įt–Ķd.
Spoon lamb m—Ėxtur–Ķ —Ėnt–ĺ –Ķ–į—Āh r–įm–Ķk—Ėn; —ē—Är–Ķ–įd —ēw–Ķ–Ķt —Ä–ĺt–įt–ĺ m—Ėxtur–Ķ –ĺv–Ķr lamb mixture. Place r–įm–Ķk—Ėn—ē on a b–įk—Ėng —ēh–Ķ–Ķt.
